name: urdf
description: URDF robot description generation and default generation-time validation. Use when creating, editing, regenerating, inspecting, or debugging `.urdf` files, Python `gen_urdf()` sources, robot links, joints, limits, inertials, visual/collision geometry, mesh references, frame conventions, or generated robot-description artifacts. Use the SRDF skill for MoveIt2 semantic groups and IK/path-planning semantics; use the cad-viewer skill for local MoveIt2 server controls; use the CAD skill for STEP/STL/
author: earthtojake
